(*: Equal contribution)

### Journal

::: {.publication-list}
::: {.publication-entry}
::: {.publication-kicker}
TMLR 2025
:::

[MaskRIS: Semantic Distortion-aware Data Augmentation for Referring Image Segmentation](https://scholar.google.com/citations?view_op=view_citation&hl=en&user=2hUlCnQAAAAJ&pagesize=100&citation_for_view=2hUlCnQAAAAJ:kNdYIx-mwKoC)

**M Lee**, S Lee, S Park, D Han, B Heo, H Shim

Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR), 2025

::: {.publication-links}
[Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?view_op=view_citation&hl=en&user=2hUlCnQAAAAJ&pagesize=100&citation_for_view=2hUlCnQAAAAJ:kNdYIx-mwKoC) [Cited by](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?oi=bibs&hl=en&cites=489177358752591045)
:::

:::

::: {.publication-entry}
::: {.publication-kicker}
PAMI 2023
:::

[Saliency as pseudo-pixel supervision for weakly and semi-supervised semantic segmentation](https://scholar.google.com/citations?view_op=view_citation&hl=en&user=2hUlCnQAAAAJ&pagesize=100&citation_for_view=2hUlCnQAAAAJ:roLk4NBRz8UC)

**M Lee**, S Lee, J Lee, H Shim

IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (PAMI), 2023

::: {.publication-links}
[Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?view_op=view_citation&hl=en&user=2hUlCnQAAAAJ&pagesize=100&citation_for_view=2hUlCnQAAAAJ:roLk4NBRz8UC) [Cited by](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?oi=bibs&hl=en&cites=2003008088484081381)
:::

:::

::: {.publication-entry}
::: {.publication-kicker}
IEEE Access 2023
:::

[Hybridmatch: Semi-supervised facial landmark detection via hybrid heatmap representations](https://scholar.google.com/citations?view_op=view_citation&hl=en&user=2hUlCnQAAAAJ&pagesize=100&citation_for_view=2hUlCnQAAAAJ:eQOLeE2rZwMC)

S Kang, **M Lee**, M Kim, H Shim

IEEE Access 11, 26125-26135, 2023

::: {.publication-links}
[Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?view_op=view_citation&hl=en&user=2hUlCnQAAAAJ&pagesize=100&citation_for_view=2hUlCnQAAAAJ:eQOLeE2rZwMC) [Cited by](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?oi=bibs&hl=en&cites=14523235329149123692)
:::

:::

:::

### Conference

::: {.publication-list}
::: {.publication-entry}
::: {.publication-kicker}
CVPR 2025
:::

[Fine-Grained Image-Text Correspondence with Cost Aggregation for Open-Vocabulary Part Segmentation](https://scholar.google.com/citations?view_op=view_citation&hl=en&user=2hUlCnQAAAAJ&pagesize=100&citation_for_view=2hUlCnQAAAAJ:Zph67rFs4hoC)

J Choi, S Lee, **M Lee**, S Lee, H Shim

Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR), 2025

::: {.publication-links}
[Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?view_op=view_citation&hl=en&user=2hUlCnQAAAAJ&pagesize=100&citation_for_view=2hUlCnQAAAAJ:Zph67rFs4hoC) [Cited by](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?oi=bibs&hl=en&cites=8989208716139156625)
:::

:::

::: {.publication-entry}
::: {.publication-kicker}
NeurIPS 2024
:::

[Understanding Multi-Granularity for Open-Vocabulary Part Segmentation](https://scholar.google.com/citations?view_op=view_citation&hl=en&user=2hUlCnQAAAAJ&pagesize=100&citation_for_view=2hUlCnQAAAAJ:UebtZRa9Y70C)

J Choi, S Lee, S Lee, **M Lee**, H Shim

Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS), 2024

::: {.publication-links}
[Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?view_op=view_citation&hl=en&user=2hUlCnQAAAAJ&pagesize=100&citation_for_view=2hUlCnQAAAAJ:UebtZRa9Y70C) [Cited by](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?oi=bibs&hl=en&cites=898559212846525744)
:::

:::

::: {.publication-entry}
::: {.publication-kicker}
ECCV 2024
:::

[SeiT++: Masked Token Modeling Improves Storage-efficient Training](https://scholar.google.com/citations?view_op=view_citation&hl=en&user=2hUlCnQAAAAJ&pagesize=100&citation_for_view=2hUlCnQAAAAJ:hqOjcs7Dif8C)

**M Lee**, S Park, B Heo, D Han, H Shim

European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV), 2024

::: {.publication-links}
[Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?view_op=view_citation&hl=en&user=2hUlCnQAAAAJ&pagesize=100&citation_for_view=2hUlCnQAAAAJ:hqOjcs7Dif8C) [Cited by](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?oi=bibs&hl=en&cites=2332272402856162004,9717333575202715682)
:::

:::

::: {.publication-entry}
::: {.publication-kicker}
CVPR 2022
:::

[Threshold matters in wsss: Manipulating the activation for the robust and accurate segmentation model against thresholds](https://scholar.google.com/citations?view_op=view_citation&hl=en&user=2hUlCnQAAAAJ&pagesize=100&citation_for_view=2hUlCnQAAAAJ:YsMSGLbcyi4C)

**M Lee**, D Kim, H Shim

Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR), 2022

::: {.publication-links}
[Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?view_op=view_citation&hl=en&user=2hUlCnQAAAAJ&pagesize=100&citation_for_view=2hUlCnQAAAAJ:YsMSGLbcyi4C) [Cited by](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?oi=bibs&hl=en&cites=11996776905163955629)
:::

:::

::: {.publication-entry}
::: {.publication-kicker}
CVPR 2021
:::

[Railroad is not a train: Saliency as pseudo-pixel supervision for weakly supervised semantic segmentation](https://scholar.google.com/citations?view_op=view_citation&hl=en&user=2hUlCnQAAAAJ&pagesize=100&citation_for_view=2hUlCnQAAAAJ:qjMakFHDy7sC)

S Lee, **M Lee**, J Lee, H Shim

Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR), 2021

::: {.publication-links}
[Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?view_op=view_citation&hl=en&user=2hUlCnQAAAAJ&pagesize=100&citation_for_view=2hUlCnQAAAAJ:qjMakFHDy7sC) [Cited by](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?oi=bibs&hl=en&cites=548329078873344604)
:::

:::

::: {.publication-entry}
::: {.publication-kicker}
AAAI 2020
:::

[Psynet: Self-supervised approach to object localization using point symmetric transformation](https://scholar.google.com/citations?view_op=view_citation&hl=en&user=2hUlCnQAAAAJ&pagesize=100&citation_for_view=2hUlCnQAAAAJ:2osOgNQ5qMEC)

K Baek, **M Lee**, H Shim

AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence, 2020

::: {.publication-links}
[Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?view_op=view_citation&hl=en&user=2hUlCnQAAAAJ&pagesize=100&citation_for_view=2hUlCnQAAAAJ:2osOgNQ5qMEC) [Cited by](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?oi=bibs&hl=en&cites=11764691911997573274)
:::

:::

:::

### Preprint

::: {.publication-list}
::: {.publication-entry}
::: {.publication-kicker}
arXiv 2025
:::

[CoPatch: Zero-Shot Referring Image Segmentation by Leveraging Untapped Spatial Knowledge in CLIP](https://scholar.google.com/citations?view_op=view_citation&hl=en&user=2hUlCnQAAAAJ&pagesize=100&citation_for_view=2hUlCnQAAAAJ:ULOm3_A8WrAC)

NM An, I Kang, **M Lee**, H Shim

arXiv preprint arXiv:2509.23098, 2025

::: {.publication-links}
[Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?view_op=view_citation&hl=en&user=2hUlCnQAAAAJ&pagesize=100&citation_for_view=2hUlCnQAAAAJ:ULOm3_A8WrAC)
:::

:::

::: {.publication-entry}
::: {.publication-kicker}
SSRN
:::

[Rethinking Weakly Supervised Semantic Segmentation Utilizing Both Point and Image Labels](https://scholar.google.com/citations?view_op=view_citation&hl=en&user=2hUlCnQAAAAJ&pagesize=100&citation_for_view=2hUlCnQAAAAJ:KlAtU1dfN6UC)

**M Lee**, H Lee, H Shim

Available at SSRN 5062471, 0

::: {.publication-links}
[Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?view_op=view_citation&hl=en&user=2hUlCnQAAAAJ&pagesize=100&citation_for_view=2hUlCnQAAAAJ:KlAtU1dfN6UC)
:::

:::

:::

### Patent

::: {.publication-list}
::: {.publication-entry}
::: {.publication-kicker}
US Patent 2023
:::

[Weakly supervised semantic segmentation device and method based on pseudo-masks](https://scholar.google.com/citations?view_op=view_citation&hl=en&user=2hUlCnQAAAAJ&pagesize=100&citation_for_view=2hUlCnQAAAAJ:LkGwnXOMwfcC)

S Hyunjung, S Lee, **LEE Minhyun**

US Patent 11,798,171, 2023

::: {.publication-links}
[Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?view_op=view_citation&hl=en&user=2hUlCnQAAAAJ&pagesize=100&citation_for_view=2hUlCnQAAAAJ:LkGwnXOMwfcC) [Cited by](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?oi=bibs&hl=en&cites=5197467333357335682)
:::

:::

:::
